calendar.matters:
PROBATE ACCOUNTING STATUS PETITION
Off Calendar Aug-10-2015 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On The Accounting For The Reserve And Proof Of Distribution Of The Remaining Reserve, If Any, From The $27,500.00 Withheld
Off Calendar Jul-07-2015 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On The Accounting For The Reserve And Proof Of Distribution Of The Remaining Reserve, If Any, From The $27,500.00 Withheld
Off Calendar Jun-16-2015 Continued To Jul-07-15 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Jonathan Ferdon for the San Francisco Public Administrator.

Mr. Ferdon stated that he reviewed this case earlier in the month, that the administrator forgot that the issue of the reserve was still pending, that they have asked for distribution and wanted clarification as to whether a formal noticed accounting was necessary. The Court stated that a formal accounting was needed absent a request to waive accountings. The status on the accounting for the reserve, etc., was continued to July 7, 2015 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for status of the accounting for the reserve.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Leslie Gomez/Craig Blackstone. Bailiff: Deputy Allen. (Not Reported)

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On The Accounting For The Reserve And Proof Of Distribution Of The Remaining Reserve, If Any, From The $27,500.00 Withheld
Off Calendar Oct-15-2014 Continued To Jun-16-15 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Jonathan Ferdon for Public Administrator.

Mr. Ferdon stated that there is a three year statute with the Internal Revenue Service ("IRS"), that the final accounts were filed in March or April of 2012, that the statute runs on that date, that he asked for an early review, that he received no response and that the IRS is no longer giving letters. Status on the reserve was continued to June 16, 2015 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy R. McConico. (Not Reported)

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On The Accounting For The Reserve And Proof Of Distribution Of The Remaining Reserve, If Any, From The $27,500.00 Withheld
Off Calendar Nov-21-2012 Continued To Oct-15-14 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Jonathan Ferdon for Public Administrator.

Mr. Ferdon addressed the Court's concern with regard to transfer of the shares to the Beneficiaries, and stated that it takes three years for any tax issues to be final and the tax reserve to be distributed. Status on the reserve was continued to October 15, 2014 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy C. Garcia.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On The Accounting For The Reserve And Proof Of Distribution Of The Remaining Reserve, If Any, From The $27,500.00 Withheld
Off Calendar Oct-24-2012 Continued To Nov-21-12 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Joel Blackman made a special apppearance for Jonathan Ferdon for the San Francisco Public Administrator.

The status hearing was continued to November 21, 2012 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for Mr. Ferdon to give notice to the Heirs of his recent declaration and to arrange for transfer of ownership of the stocks to the Heirs.

Judge: Peter Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy M. Benton.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On The Accounting For The Reserve And Proof Of Distribution Of The Remaining Reserve, If Any, From The $27,500.00 Withheld
Off Calendar Sep-26-2012 Continued To Oct-24-12 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Jonathan Ferdon for Public Administrator.

Mr. Ferdon requested the matter be continued, and stated that he will provide a copy of the Status Report to the Heirs and that he did not know where the receipts for the stocks are. Status on the accounting for the reserve, etc. was continued to October 24, 2012 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for further status with regard to the receipts and proof of notice to the Heirs.

Judge: Peter Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Santiago.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On The Accounting For The Reserve And Proof Of Distribution Of The Remaining Reserve, If Any, From The $27,500.00 Withheld
Off Calendar Sep-19-2012 Continued To Sep-26-12 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Off Calendar Aug-24-2011 Granted Per Written Order

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Jul-27-2011 Continued To Aug-24-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar May-17-2011 Continued To Jul-27-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar May-03-2011 Continued To May-17-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Of Filing Of Petition For Final Distribution Or Report Of Status Of Administration
Off Calendar Mar-30-2011 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Of Filing Of Petition For Final Distribution Or Report Of Status Of Administration
Off Calendar Mar-09-2011 Continued To Mar-30-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Jonathan Ferdon for the San Francisco Public Administrator (SFPA) (Administrator of the Estate).

Mr. Ferdon stated that he had given the final account to the Public Administrator to go over, that Mr. Schruba was a victim in a criminal matter, that he had contacted the District Attorney to inquire how the restitution will affect distribution, that $39,000.00 is to be paid back, but that there is no date to pay the money back. In addition, Mr. Ferdon requested a continuance to May stating that they have some work ahead noting that the accounting didn't occur until one year from the date of death. The Court stated that it wants to see a 12200 petition on file, set status on the filing of the 12200 petition for March 30, 2011, and stated that once the petition is on file that the status would go off calendar.

Judge Pro Tem: Sue Kaplan. Court Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR# 11312. Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda. Bailiff: Deputy J. Gomez.

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION WITH WILL ANNEXED
Off Calendar Dec-23-2008 Granted Per Written Order
